# openmoe (openmoe.ai)

> Byzantine-fault-tolerant consensus for MoE routing.

openmoe-bft is an open-source library for Byzantine-fault-tolerant Mixture-of-Experts routing — with built-in EU AI Act compliance attestation for production AI infrastructure.

## What this is
openmoe is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- openmoe-bft-mcp.route: Make BFT-verified Mixture-of-Experts routing decisions from any agent.
- openmoe-bft-mcp.attest: Generate signed EU AI Act compliance attestations for routing decisions via MCP.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://openmoe.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://openmoe.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://openmoe.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://openmoe.ai/pricing/
